mapper.select: SELECT a.attr_code, a.attr_name FROM ecm_dtd_attr a LEFT JOIN ecm_dtd_doc_rel b ON b.dtd_type_id = a.dtd_type_id LEFT JOIN ecm_doc_def c ON c.doc_code = b.doc_code WHERE c.doc_code = #{identifyCode}
SELECT a.attr_code, a.attr_name FROM ecm_dtd_attr a LEFT JOIN ecm_dtd_doc_rel b on b.dtd_type_id = a.dtd_type_id LEFT JOIN ecm_doc_def c on c.doc_code = b.doc_code WHERE c.doc_code = #{identifyCode}
